ddls:
CREATE TABLE "roms" (
  "rom_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ROM */,
  "crc32" TEXT /* CRC32 checksum of the ROM file */,
  "md5" TEXT /* MD5 checksum of the ROM file */,
  "sha1" TEXT /* SHA1 checksum of the ROM file */,
  "system_id" INTEGER /* ID of the system the ROM is for */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the game */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region the ROM is intended for */,
  "version_tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version tag associated with the ROM */,
  "rom_metadata_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metadata associated with the ROM */,
  "rom_status_id" INTEGER /* ID of the status of the ROM */,
  "catalog_id" INTEGER /* ID of the catalog the ROM belongs to */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Size of the ROM file in bytes */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the ROM was created */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date the ROM was last modified */,
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publisher of the ROM */,
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the developer of the ROM */,
  "last_verified_date" TEXT /* Date the ROM was last verified for integrity */,
  "download_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the ROM has been downloaded */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Average user rating for the ROM */,
  "review_count" INTEGER /* Number of user reviews for the ROM */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rom_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_roms_system_id FOREIGN KEY ("system_id") REFERENCES systems ("system_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_roms_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_roms_catalog_id FOREIGN KEY ("catalog_id") REFERENCES catalogs ("catalog_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_roms_rom_metadata_id FOREIGN KEY ("rom_metadata_id") REFERENCES rom_metadata ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_roms_version_tag_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_tag_id") REFERENCES version_tags ("version_tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_roms_developer_id FOREIGN KEY ("developer_id") REFERENCES developers ("developer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_roms_rom_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("rom_status_id") REFERENCES rom_status ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_roms_publisher_id FOREIGN KEY ("publisher_id") REFERENCES publishers ("publisher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "systems" (
  "system_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gaming system */,
  "system_name" TEXT /* Name of the gaming system */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the gaming system */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manufacturer of the system */,
  "release_year" INTEGER /* Year the system was released */,
  "active_status" TEXT /* Status of the system (e.g., Active, Discontinued) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("system_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_systems_manufacturer_id FOREIGN KEY ("manufacturer_id") REFERENCES manufacturers ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "version_tags" (
  "version_tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version tag */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the version tag */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the version tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rom_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "rom_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ROM the metadata is associated with */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the game */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the game */,
  "artwork" TEXT /* File path to the game's artwork */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre of the game */,
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* ID of the platform of the game */,
  "esrb_rating" TEXT /* ESRB rating of the game */,
  "developer_notes" TEXT /* Notes from the developers about the ROM */,
  "user_notes" TEXT /* Notes from users about the ROM */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rom_metadata_platform_id FOREIGN KEY ("platform_id") REFERENCES platforms ("platform_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rom_metadata_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rom_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "catalogs" (
  "catalog_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each catalog */,
  "catalog_name" TEXT /* Name of the catalog */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the catalog */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the catalog belongs to */,
  "visibility" TEXT /* Visibility status of the catalog (e.g., Public, Private) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("catalog_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_catalogs_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publishers" (
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publisher */,
  "publisher_name" TEXT /* Name of the publisher */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the publisher */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the publisher */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the publisher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publisher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "developers" (
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each developer */,
  "developer_name" TEXT /* Name of the developer */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the developer */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the developer */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the developer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("developer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "manufacturers" (
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manufacturer */,
  "manufacturer_name" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the manufacturer */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the manufacturer */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the manufacturer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "platforms" (
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each platform */,
  "platform_name" TEXT /* Name of the platform */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("platform_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role of the user */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date the user last logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
